context: Evaluates the implementation of envelope encryption for note storage, comprising `encrypt_note` and `decrypt_note` functions. Each note must be encrypted with a freshly generated per-note DEK, and the DEK must be encrypted with the vault master key. The `EncryptedNote` struct must store all ciphertext and nonce values needed for round-trip decryption. Authentication tag validation must reject incorrect master keys.

checklist.name: Fresh DEK per encrypt call
checklist.description: Calls `generate_dek()` to produce a new random 32-byte DEK on each invocation of `encrypt_note`, ensuring that identical notes produce different ciphertexts.

checklist.name: DEK encryption with master key
checklist.description: Encrypts the DEK bytes with the master key using `encrypt()`, and stores the resulting DEK ciphertext and nonce in `EncryptedNote.dek_ciphertext` and `dek_nonce`.

checklist.name: Note content encryption
checklist.description: Encrypts note title and body separately with the DEK using `encrypt()`, storing each ciphertext and nonce in the corresponding `EncryptedNote` fields.

checklist.name: Round-trip correctness
checklist.description: `decrypt_note` with the same master key reconstructs the original `Note` with matching title, body, and metadata fields.

checklist.name: Wrong key rejection
checklist.description: `decrypt_note` returns an `Err` (AES-GCM authentication failure) when called with a different master key, rather than silently returning garbage data.

checklist.name: EncryptedNote struct completeness
checklist.description: The `EncryptedNote` struct contains all required fields: `id`, `notebook_id`, `title_ciphertext`, `title_nonce`, `body_ciphertext`, `body_nonce`, `dek_ciphertext`, `dek_nonce`, `is_pinned`, `created_at`, `updated_at`.
